productDisplayName: Baggit Women Luggage Baby Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 10 cm x 19 cm Crafted from velvet with a three-fold open style Contrast synthetic panelling on the upper with magnetic closure One main compartment with eleven card holders, three insert pockets, a zippered pocket and an id card holder One zippered pocket at the back Printed branding on the back Care Wipe with clean, dry cloth to remove dirt
